usage: fmtkit <format|format-all|go|ts|lint|check|version|help> [args...]
  format [--ts] [--go] [--quiet] [paths...]  format changed files (vs HEAD) and untracked ones
  format-all [--ts] [--go] [--quiet]       format every file, against .
      --ts   only TS/Vue lint + formatting; --go   only Go formatting; default: all
  go <check|format|sources|version|help>  run the Go formatter CLI
  ts [paths...]                            run TS/Vue formatting support and oxfmt
  lint [paths...]                          lint TS/Vue files with oxlint
  check [args...]                          run the Go formatter in check mode
  version                                  print the fmtkit version
